channel.title: Foundry on Cyril's Cloud & AI Daily
channel.description: Recent content in Foundry on Cyril's Cloud & AI Daily

item.title: Plan and Prepare to Develop AI Solutions on Azure - Training
item.description:
Learning objectives By the end of this module, you’ll be able to: Identify common AI capabilities that you can implement in applications Describe Microsoft Foundry and considerations for using it Describe Foundry Tools and considerations for using them Identify appropriate developer tools and SDKs for an AI project Describe considerations for.

🔗 Read the full article

Curated by Cyril Bou-Harb — Solution Engineer, Cloud & AI at Microsoft. Views are my own.

item.title: Role-based access control for Microsoft Foundry - Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Role-based access control for Microsoft Foundry Summarize this article for me In this article In this article, you learn core role-based access control (RBAC) concepts for Microsoft Foundry, including scopes, built-in roles, and common enterprise assignment patterns. Minimum role assignments to get started For new users to Azure and Microsoft F….

Curated by Cyril Bou-Harb — Solution Engineer, Cloud & AI at Microsoft. Views are my own.

item.title: Microsoft Foundry Quickstart - Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry quickstart Summarize this article for me In this article In this quickstart you’ll get started using models and agents in Foundry. Python C# TypeScript Java REST API Foundry portal Install the current version of azure-ai-projects. Tip Code uses Azure AI Projects 2.x and is incompatible with … Tip Code uses Azure AI Projects 2.x.

Curated by Cyril Bou-Harb — Solution Engineer, Cloud & AI at Microsoft. Views are my own.
